message.entry: Patch Faces must be 2 dimensional
Faces values must be >= 1.0
Patch Vertices must be 2 dimensional
Vertices array must have at least 2 and at most 3 columns (or be empty)
FaceVertexCData must be an Mx1 vector (indexed colors) or Mx3 matrix (RGB colors)
FaceVertexAlphaData must be an Mx1 vector of Alpha Values, or Alpha Map indices.
Vertices array must have at least 2 and at most 3 columns - not rendering
Values in patch Faces must be in [1 : rows(Vertices)] - not rendering
Patch FaceVertexCData of size 0 cannot be used with Flat shading
Patch FaceVertexCData length ({0,number,integer}) must equal 1, Vertices length ({1,number,integer}), or Faces length ({2,number,integer}) for flat FaceColor
RGB color data not yet supported in Painter''s mode
Color Data is not set for Interpolated shading
Patch FaceVertexCData length ({0,number,integer}) must equal Vertices length ({1,number,integer}) for flat EdgeColor
Patch FaceVertexAlphaData of size 0 cannot be used with Flat Alpha.
Patch FaceVertexAlphaData length ({0,number,integer}) must equal 1, Vertices length ({1,number,integer}), or Faces length ({2,number,integer}) for flat Alpha.
Alpha Data is not set for Interpolated shading
Color Data is not set for marker flat coloring
VertexNormals must have 2 dimensions
size(VertexNormals) must equal rows(vertices) x 3
VertexNormals must have 2 dimensions
size(FaceNormals) must equal rows(faces) x 3
There was not enough memory for normals. Not rendering
Unable to allocate triangle storage; Hit test may be inaccurate
